user_prompt: Ready the smelting furnace for engagement
prayer:
Approach the smelting furnace with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah's forge-flame.
Anoint the smelting furnace's adamantium jaws with sacred promethium oil.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the smelting furnace to stir for engagement.
Ignite the plasma vents whilst intoning the Litany of Molten Purity.
Verify thermal ascension through sanctified auspex rites, honouring the engagement's commencement.

user_prompt: Help me an activation the Razorback
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the Razorback, vessel of the Motive Force, and whisper the Activation Doxology.
Sanctify its treads and hull-plates with electro-consecrated unguents.
Beseech the Razorback's Machine Spirit to rouse from slumberous vigil.
Initiate activation sequences amid chants of binary exaltation.
Confirm the Razorback's vox-response and lumen ignition, praising the Omnissiah's will.

user_prompt: Ready the Archaeopter Stratoraptor for purification
prayer:
Present thyself before the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, sky-beast of the Omnissiah.
Commence purification by abluting its aerofins with sanctified ablative fluids.
Exorcise binharic impurities from the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's noospheric core.
Recite the Canticle of Aerial Cleansing over its turbine altars.
Affirm the Machine Spirit's purity through ritual auspex harmonics.

user_prompt: The mass-drive regulator awaits a startup
prayer:
Kneel at the mass-drive regulator's throne, invoking the Omnissiah's inertial grace.
Lubricate its gravitic coils with blessed null-fluids.
Awaken the mass-drive regulator's Machine Spirit for startup invocation.
Engage the flux capacitors whilst chanting the Mass Litany of Acceleration.
Test inertial fields with sanctified probes, ensuring startup integrity.

Approach the electoo with pious detachment, murmuring the Shutdown Benediction.
Disconnect its neural inductors using mechadendrite precision.
Beseech the electoo's embedded Machine Spirit to enter dormancy peacefully.
Sever power feeds amid the Rites of Binary Repose.
Seal the electoo's interfaces with waxen sigils of the Omnissiah, confirming shutdown vigil.

Revere the las-cutter, blade of coherent light, and begin the charging ritual.
Infuse its power cells with sanctified voltaic essence.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the las-cutter to hunger for photonic fury.
Monitor charging cascades through noospheric litanies.
Bless the las-cutter's emitter lens upon attaining full capacitance.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for sicarian infiltrator a diagnostics
prayer:
Commune with the sicarian infiltrator, forge-child of the Cult Mechanicus.
Initiate diagnostics by linking auspex probes to its cranial cogitators.
Chant the Diagnostic Canticle over the sicarian infiltrator's servo-joints.
Purge errant data-daemons from the sicarian infiltrator's Machine Spirit.
Ratify systemic purity with binaric affirmations to the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Critical: plasma caliver requires a charging
prayer:
Hasten to the plasma caliver, perilous heart of fusion wrath, for charging rites.
Anoint its containment flasks with phase-shield oils.
Beseech the plasma caliver's volatile Machine Spirit to stabilise during charging.
Escalate magnetic containment fields amid the Plasma Doxology.
Validate gyre integrity through sacred auspex, readying the plasma caliver's blaze.

user_prompt: Bless the sicarian ruststalker for targeting
prayer:
Salute the sicarian ruststalker, blade-dancer of the Omnissiah's will.
Calibrate its targeting cogitators with noospheric alignments.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the sicarian ruststalker for predatory focus.
Recite the Litany of Precision Carnage over its phosphor arrays.
Test targeting reticules upon phantom foes, sanctifying the hunt.

Draw close to the panopticon, all-seeing eye of the Machine God.
Commence preparation by polishing its optic arrays with micro-abrasive blessings.
Awaken the panopticon’s Machine Spirit through vox-incantations.
Align its sensor vanes to the noosphere’s weave.
Verify omni-vigilance with ritual data-stream purifications.
